metadata.description: Sherpa — composable spec/plan/implement layers; the user composes the workflow

plugins.name: sherpa
plugins.description: Develop like a sherpa: composable /spec, /plan, /implement skills — one per layer (macro, step, build) — with bundled scout/review/build subagents. The user composes the workflow; nothing persists unless you call /persist. Extend via project packs.
